Your feedback is invaluable, and we will use it to ensure we continue to improve our offeri

reviews.title: Has definitely moved to market itself as avenue for families.
reviews.positives: Beautiful location have stayed many times over the years.
reviews.negatives: Bathroom was tired, shower head very average.

reviews.title: Old hotel
reviews.text: This hotel caters more to local tourists and guests who plays golf. It is not ideal for guests who wants to explore the blue mountains. There are no available guided tours from the hotel and no sufficient information for those who wants to explore the outdoors. It is a old hotel.

reviews.title: Love the facilities but not our dinner
reviews.positives:
Breakfast was great, my kids really enjoyed the Buffet selections. Kids facilities was excellent, keep them occupied.
Location is not far from Leura and Katoomba.
reviews.negatives:
The lobby lounge only open until 8, staffs are little slow. One person was wearing sunglasses at night?!
Taste of our pizza and calamari were not good. The lounge should have opened until late

reviews.title: michael
reviews.text:
The hotel appears a bit 'tired', with reduced maintenance levels.
Restaurants were below standard with primitive wine lists.
The noisy conferance participants removed any illusion of a first class hotel.
Carpark was completely ful, mainly occupied by visitors to the golf club.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: facility was beautiful, buffet breakfast was good
reviews.negatives: we came on an anniversary weekend hoping to use the facilities, however there were so many kids we couldn't use the pool,spa or sauna at all the whole time we were there. perhaps a separate adults spa and sauna would be ideal.

reviews.title: Should have kept the room service tray
reviews.text: Shocked I was charged $4 for the room service tray, who on earth charges $4 for a tray that was returned, I should have kept it!

reviews.title: Comfortable, good location but very noisy!
reviews.positives: Location was amazing with a beautiful view, friendly staff and comfortable bed. I purposely booked this hotel as it had a bath.
reviews.negatives: A lot of children, older kids knocking on bedroom doors at 10pm at night. Screaming kids also during the day, no quiet area at all. I wouldn't rate it a 4 star hotel, rooms were comfortable but average. Apart from location, not worth the price for me. Most likely suitable for families but not a solo traveler (teacher) during school holidays!!

reviews.title: Good Location
reviews.text: I booked this hotel on early 2015 and stayed for one night. That was really great. Clean and nice room. But this time the toilet flushing button broken. The shower tab pull off. Hotel staff needed to call the maintenance guy to fix them. Some facilities are old and broken.
reviews.positives: Kid friendly, Great Location and Staff friendly

reviews.title: Beautiful resort - but avoid weekend stays if you're a childless couple looking to unwind
reviews.positives:
The view (particularly by the Ember Lounge Fireplace) was really beautiful, and had all the right amenities for a great stay, including a pool, sauna, library, billiards room, kids zone and more. The King Bedroom was spacious. If you are a family with children then it has lots of activities to keep your little ones busy. 

Close to town so plenty of great restaurants and bars to visit, and near a lot of the Blue Mountains attractions.
reviews.negatives:
While I couldn't fault the hotel itself, if you are a couple without children, I would highly recommend you avoid weekend stays. My husband as been twice for mid week work trips and he had a very calm and pleasant experience. However, when we visited for a relaxing weekend away, we both left even more stressed than when we arrived. This was because the entire time we were surrounded by screaming children - at breakfast, at the bar, in the pool and sauna, and even in our room we could hear children running up and down the hallway yelling and banging on doors at 7am. This is quite a family friendly hotel with lots for the little ones to do - including a kids zone(we did not realise this at the time of booking), so if you have kids this place would be great for you!

Additionally I would recommend that you book things well in advance. We could not get a restaurant booking at Embers or No.1 Sublime Pt, or a spa booking when trying to book on the day we arrived. They did offer us a reservation at the bistro at the golf club - only available on the Friday as Saturday was booked (we checked it out but it wasn't the vibe we were looking for for a weekend away so we left, however would be find for those who are happy with a casual bistro environment).

reviews.title: nice and quite
reviews.text: happy
reviews.positives: comfy, quite and family oriented

reviews.title: Can't go past for kids
reviews.positives: I liked all the activities for kids and in room dining.
reviews.negatives: There was a note left for previous/future guest, bathroom had hair left on floor that wasn't ours - didn't seem like it had the time required for full clean...

reviews.title: comfortable
reviews.text: We would have felt more welcomed if the staffs were a bit more friendly. didn't even get an acknowledging smile from them. Very indifferent attitude. Smiles welcome guests.
reviews.positives: the hotel design, large comofrtable rooms and beds

reviews.title: Good
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: Got charged for restaurant service we didn’t order

reviews.title: Comfortable stay in large hotel
reviews.text:
We had an ok stay here - the room and hotel is comfortable but it is looking a bit tired and could do with a refurb. The bathroom in particular was dated, and not very clean either unfortunately. I thought it was overpriced for what it offered. 

This would be a great hotel for a conference or a wedding, but it's a bit out of the way of things if you're a tourist without your own transport.
reviews.positives: Quiet location

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Kids zone
Grounds 
Train ride for kids
reviews.negatives: Dated and in need of a paint and good clean

reviews.title: Midweek getaway
reviews.text: Our stay was comfortable but the room lacked a few basic amenities such as a mini bar and snacks a shower cap in the bathroom

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Resort offers a good range of recreational options - especially for families. The rooms are a good size with plenty of room to move around and the decor is comfortable inside the rooms - they are also nice and clean with comfortable beds; the rooms are dark (amazing block out curtains) and the heating made the whole resort nice and snug.
reviews.negatives:
Main gripe I would say is the customer service was only fair.  The staff are pleasant enough but have little knowledge of what is going on outside of their 'box'. One example was my experience prior to arrival of arranging pre payment (due to members of my group were arriving before me) and allocating names to rooms under my booking was unsatisfactory - I spoke to 3 different people, had 3 different conversations, had 3 confirmations of details received and all okay and my group still had a problem accessing their rooms as told no details on the system?   

The food choices are very few and could be markedly improved - more options where families can sit and have a normal cafe meal would be recommended - burgers, schnitzels, toast in the morning - all of these are simple and popular foods that families enjoy.  Also on this - waiting 25 minutes for a cup of coffee is ridiculous! it wasn't even busy. Everyone seems to be moving around on the upper level with lots of space downstairs saved for the higher end food (which not all can afford of course) it just doesn't make sense so in wrap up the food is expensive with limited choice (we picked up takeaway 2 out of the 3 nights we stayed as was underwhelmed by the meal we had at the resort the first night). 

In relation to decor - the common areas show some wear and tear, would suggest a bit of polish on the floors to make them shine and the lift areas would benefit from some TLC.

reviews.title: An awesome stay at Fairmont Resort
reviews.text: We stayed at Fairmont Resort for couple of days, and we had a great time. It is a very big place, great amenities, perfect for families they have a Timezone style gaming rokm for kida to enjoy, 2 swimming pool, they also have a sauna and spa. And a health wellness centre, and 6 different Restaurant, they also provide free breakfast, which is really great lots of food to enjoy, and staff are all very friendly. I would recommend it. Parking fee is $15 per night, but if you have *** Membership which is free to join, youcan get the free parking.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: This hotel is very family friendly, lots of things for kids to do. As parent, it is most important thing I don't need to do too much to keep my 7 years old girl busy. All the staff are very nice and helpful.
reviews.negatives: This hotel is just very old, need big renovation. Even beddings are very old. Because it is so old, it doesn't feel clean enough for me.

reviews.title: Average hotel and outdated.
reviews.text: Very average hotel.. outdated.. age is showing up, toilet is poor, showers are not working well.

reviews.title: Great location but needs a refurb in the spa/pool area
reviews.positives:
The beds are really comfortable, staff really friendly and location is excellent.
 Breakfast is also great
reviews.negatives: The pool was really dirty unfortunately and it's very much a family hotel which is confusing when it's also a golf resort and conference space. It's quite run down

reviews.title: Great potential but average service and facilities
reviews.text: So much potential for this property and could use refurbishment and renovation to make it modern and valuable. The beds were comfortable but the room assigned was noisy and closer to the entrance road (room 307) and loading bay and spoiled the sleep (and too late to request a change) plus no water bottles were provided and upon calling, was asked to drink tap water and ended up in a trip to Coles and alter found, there were vending machines available to get water. So, value for money is moderate and front desk service lacked genuine warmth and customer  service. Overall, not satisfactory though the stay is just one night.

reviews.title: Amazing views
reviews.positives:
The views are absolutely stunning, it also has a big territory that allows you to feel much closer to the beauty of Blue Mountains. 
The resort also has a wide variety of facilities that are worth exploring, swimming pools, spa, heaps of kids entertainment. Generally a very good place to stay.
reviews.negatives:
Two things stood out as genuinely frustrating during our stay.

First, the service speed was a real issue throughout. I waited roughly 45 minutes for a single coffee, watching one staff member walk back to the fridge to collect milk individually for each cup in the queue. At breakfast the following morning, four sandwiches and four coffees took close to an hour to arrive. One of the sandwiches was also brought out incorrectly and had to be replaced. That one was for a child, so we had to manage a small crisis at the table while waiting. For a resort of this standard, the pace and accuracy of service fell well short of expectations.

Second, the parking situation was a real letdown. I received a message from the resort encouraging me to pre-book parking to avoid public fees, which I did. But when we went to exit, the barrier required payment of a public fee regardless. We ended up paying twice. Given that the system uses plate recognition technology, this should have been a seamless, automated experience. Instead it felt like the pre-booking offer was misleading, whether intentionally or not.

reviews.title: Pleasant stay
reviews.text: Very dated hotel, certain areas stunk. But the rooms were comfy and plenty of activities for the kids

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Facilities are excellent for family trip. My kids have experienced ice skating for the first time in their life, there are also swimming pool, playground and giant slide inside the hotel. It's about 5mins drive to a fantastic lookout nearby.

reviews.title: Never again
reviews.text: This resort is a playground for kids & almost everything you have to pay extra. Booked with breakfast included but absence upon checking so we pay again. The aircons is too warm despite a 20c setting render you have to open the windows. Staff are nice though, mostly
reviews.response:
Dear Lawrence,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We sincerely regret that your stay at Fairmont Resort Blue Mountains did not meet your expectations.

We apologize for the inconvenience regarding the breakfast, and we understand how frustrating it can be when such details are missed upon check-in. We will review our processes to ensure clearer communication moving forward.

Regarding the air conditioning, we regret that the temperature was not to your satisfaction. We will have our maintenance team investigate the issue to ensure it is functioning properly for future guests.

We are pleased to hear that you found our staff to be welcoming, and we truly appreciate your kind words. Your comments are valuable to us, and we will continue working to improve the overall guest experience.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide a more enjoyable stay.

Warm regards,  
Guest Relations Team

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Sauna
reviews.negatives: Stores closed too early

reviews.title: two night with a 3 and 10 years old
reviews.text: The facility used to be magnificent, but it has become a lot more run down. I have put the clean up sign since 11 am, but nobody has come in to clean until 3 : 30 pm when I asked them to come to clean. And when the cleaning lady came, she said she has no vacuum cleaning with her, and do I want just towel or do I need the full service. It is quite disappointing.   The pony service was discontinued without any notice.  There was not a lot to play that is working.   I think the location is nice but overall experience is disappointing.
reviews.response:
Dear Ai,

Thank you for sharing your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the issues you experienced during your stay at Fairmont Resort Blue Mountains.

We are very sorry to hear that the cleanliness of your room was not up to standard, and we understand how frustrating it must have been to request service multiple times. Please know this is not the level of service we aim to provide, and we will be addressing this with our housekeeping team to ensure timely and thorough room cleanings in the future.

We also regret that the pony service was discontinued without prior notice and that some of the facilities were not fully operational. We understand how disappointing this must have been, especially with children eager to enjoy the resort’s activities. We will review our communication and maintenance processes to ensure a more enjoyable experience for future guests.

Your comments are important to us, and we will work on making the necessary improvements. We hope to have the opportunity

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Great facilities and location
reviews.negatives: Not enough food options around

reviews.title: Improvement needed.
reviews.text:
The good: lots to keep kids occupied, especially in the holidays. Their cinema plays a movie every 2 hours, indoor pool great in winter, the magic craig show was great and was free, lots of other activities too. Our room was cleaned when we went for breakfast. 
The negatives: couldn’t book dinner in their restaurant for the whole 3 nights because they were booked out. The only restaurant available without booking didn’t have an extensive menu. Breakfast was the same everyday, very crowded and canned beans and tomatoes were used rather than fresh ones. Seen staff wiping tables and letting scraps fall onto the floor. Resort floor in many areas wasn’t clean. Most kids activities cost money, which should be free because room cost is double in the school holidays. They were also all booked out. Was only able to book one activity for the three days, and buy tickets for their large outdoor slide.
reviews.response:
Dear Fatme,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We're glad to hear that your children enjoyed the various activities, including the cinema, indoor pool, and the Magic Craig show—it's always great to know that our guests appreciate the entertainment options we provide.

However, we are truly sorry to hear about the challenges you faced during your stay. We understand your frustration with the difficulty in booking dinner at our restaurant, and we apologize for the inconvenience this caused. We will look into better ways to manage reservations to avoid such issues in the future. Additionally, we’re sorry that the available dining options didn’t meet your expectations, and we appreciate your feedback on the menu variety.

We also regret that the breakfast experience and cleanliness of some areas did not meet the standards you expected. Your comments regarding canned ingredients, crowded spaces, and staff procedures are being taken seriously, and we’ll address these with our team

reviews.title: Happy that i came
reviews.positives: So beautiful. The receptionist was amazing
reviews.negatives: Heard babies crying a little from the next room

reviews.title: Not my cuppa tea!! Probably good for family with kids
reviews.text: Location is okay, near 3 Sisters look out, the town its located in is ‘Leura’ its kinda boring and super quiet.  Hotel is probably great for family(Family Weekend Getaway). There are plenty stuff/somewhat activities that kids these day like to do. Parents booked the room here, dump the kids free ranging,  go off to do whatever they want then parents off to the hotel’s bar and get shitfaced. This is how I see it. My own opinion tho :)

reviews.title: Perfect for a short winter holiday
reviews.positives:
I got very good customer support before arriving. The kids loved it.

It would make it even better if there was a kids club I can leave my kids to do an activity and just relax
reviews.negatives: That the games for the kids were very centered in video games. Also, i would have liked to be informed that I had to make a reservation to have dinner at the main restaurant.

reviews.title: Fairmont Resort Australia NSW
reviews.text:
It was the same menu for breakfast at least variety the following day will be better.
Bathroom had no bath soap the container was empty and no large bath towels.

The corridor was dirty from day 1 to day three.Cleaners would attend to the rooms but forget to vacuum and tidy up the corridor.

reviews.title: Lovely rooms but had to go out to eat / disappointing
reviews.positives: Clean and comfy
reviews.negatives:
When we arrived it took  almost 25mins to check into . The manager ( who checked us in)  was slow and non communicative and unfriendly . 
The Restaurant - no bookings available on the first night we arrived in the main restaurant or the golf club . We felt hotel guests should have been advised to book ahead .
Not enough staff to cater for guests for Breakfast the following morning - took almost 10 mins of queuing to check in for breakfast .  Had to go back and que at check in to order a coffee . 
The whole restaurant/ breakfast part seemed totally disorganised and chaotic .
Food average - not restaurant standard .

reviews.title: Good for young kids
reviews.text: We have been before about 4 years ago, not much has been changed or updated. Good for kids, staff friendly and place clean. Food not great and over priced. However there are plenty of places to eat in Leura.

reviews.title: Beautiful location!
reviews.positives: The location is beautiful.  Good access to hiking trails. Great views of the Blue Mountains.
reviews.negatives:
The property is old.  It does need updating.  The beds were just okay.  Pillows were terrible.  Haven’t been replaced in quite a while.
Seems like it’s a property geared toward families.

reviews.title: Excellent Location But Some Letdowns
reviews.text:
The setting is very nicely done and the place looks great when you enter. Surroundings are also quite nice with scenery and layout as well. The only letdowns were:

1 - The spa wasn't working and there was no disclosure until we asked the next day.
2 - The on site restaurant was slow, expensive and service was poor

We asked for more bread and were told they ran out and had to ration it for other customers.

After ordering the grilled asparagus side we were told they ran out, however lo and behold our chicken dish came out with asparagus.

Our food arrived well after other tables sat down and others that arrived before us got theirs after us as well.

3 waiters were not attentive - and the place was hardly busy - there were maybe 6 tables altogether.

The food was not to our liking either - attempted fancy dishes tasted funny.

The best part of the stay was the Whiskey bar which was amazing - I am not sure if the two business are affiliated in any way I would guess they are not.

All in all - the stay was simply not worth the $300 per night that they charge - recommend to find something with more value elsewhere.

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.positives: Lovely view
reviews.negatives:
Shower over bath difficult and allowed water on floor. 
Breakfast was always cold!

reviews.title: Friendly staff
reviews.text: This hotel is more suited for families with young children because of the facility. Don’t come during school holidays you won’t be able to relax,  kids were everywhere during our stay. We came to  relax  & have sometime for ourselves but it was too noisy, kids were running outside our room’s hallways, they’re also in the swimming pool all the time, you can see/hear them screaming eg  in the restaurant. It wasn’t a pleasant stay at all. We also couldn’t contact the front desk from our room, & the concierge & other areas of the hotel to book the restaurant, order food or stuff from housekeeping nobody answered their  phones. We ended up calling the front desk from our private phone using their  outside number. The carpets were outdated a bit untidy. Breakfast menu was the same every day. The only positive thing was the staff friendliness & they tried to offer a solution with our issues. I’d like to especially mention Angeline & Sam from the front desk who were helpful about our issues, David Oh from the restaurant who was accommodating & made our dining a pleasant experience. I’ll recommend this hotel for families with young children but not for couples.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: I love how there was lost of facilities available for children but I feel it needs a bit of update

reviews.title: The hotel was lovely and the staff were ok but i found the food to be a hit or miss deal
reviews.text: One night the meal i ordered was fantastic and whilst i ordered the exact same meal the following night it was obviously another chef's interpretation of the meal which left me bewildered and disappointed as it wasn't what i had received the night before

Johnathan, we hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back again in future where we are confident you will receive our high level of both product and service that has so many of guests returning time and again,
Kind regards
Scott O'Neile
General Manager

Adam at concierge is great and attentive.

Kids facilities are great. But should patron often by staff in case guests need help.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.negatives: Expected indoor pool and spa to be warmer.

reviews.text: Very friendly with kids, gifts for kid everywhere within the hotel n its restaurants. Only lifts n rooms facilities  are old, should be replaced and upgraded. Room is spacious

General Manager

reviews.title: Fantastic Family Friendly Hotel
reviews.positives: We absolutely loved the place. It has lots of activities for our daughter. We enjoyed our stay. We will surely come back for a longer stay.
reviews.negatives: Limited food options.

reviews.title: Luxury needs to come with service
reviews.text: The resort is great, good location, and all the bells and whistles. The service was a bit laxed - some staff looked happy to serve and provided 5* service, while others seemed intent on making life difficult. Perhaps it was low season, but after experiencing many 5* resorts throughout Asia, this was disappointing. If you can ignore the staff/service, the rest is great. I think it's normally a lot more expensive here, so I'm not sure it's value for money.
reviews.response:
Thank you for your review.
We are pleased you enjoyed the resort, our idyllic location and the facilities in general.
I was most upset to read of the service levels you receive. This is such a main area of focus for the resort, with  much training, resources and time allocated to it. As a result we usually receive accolades for the warmth and personalised nature of our service and I am so sorry this was not apparent during your visit. I wanted to assure you this is not reflective of our normal levels and we thank you for brining it to our attention.
We do hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in future where we are confident you will experience our highly efficient and warm service throughout all elements of your stay.
Warm regards
Scott O'Neile
General Manager

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Everything you need on this hotel is here most specially for family with the kids this is a great place to stay. There food in Restaurant is exceptional .
reviews.negatives: The only problem is the noise with the kids early in the morning just next to our room i hope they can separate the rooms with the family and kids so people can relax more.

reviews.title: Not as good as Expected
reviews.positives: 1) Location was fine

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: the resort itself is great for families
reviews.negatives: breakfast buffet needs ALOT of improvement, the reception lounge/bar/cafe area needs more staff, over a 45 minute wait for coffee only and the bottom fire place area should be opened for lunch as well, such a beautiful space wasted in the day!

reviews.title: Comfortable stay in king bedroom
reviews.text: We just stayed one night. Though we didnt utilise many of hotel facilities , we had a great time in this hotel. it's located near Leura mall, it'd be best place if you like to play golf.
reviews.positives: The big size of bed, spacious room, great view from the entrance

reviews.title: Enjoyed our stay and will visit again
reviews.positives: Very relaxed atmosphere. Lots of facilities for kids
reviews.negatives: Eating facilities limited.

reviews.title: Nice hotel but some areas still need a refurb!
reviews.text:
the hotel is set in a beautiful location and the newly refurbished rooms are very comfortable and spacious. the outdoor pool is very nice although the indoor pool, squash courts and gym are in need of an upgrade (and if you go to the hotel midweek the pool is taken over my kids swimming classes for most of the afternoon/ early evening). the hotel restaurant and bar was ok but very over-priced.
the staff are all very friendly and we had a lovely stay.
reviews.positives: Beautiful surroundings, good sized rooms

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
The location was beautiful. The indoor pool; jacuzzi and sauna perfect fun. The resort has good facilities but a little outdated . 
The staff at the reception was really good and gave us a warm welcome.
Thank you for the wine as we were celebrating my mum’s 60th birthday.
reviews.negatives:
The breakfast could have had more option. Like simple things eggs to order. 
When we reached for breakfast we were informed that after 45 mins the table needs to be emptied as they are busy. Now that is not something I appreciate. There were so many restaurants in that property and they can be opened too if there are a lot of guests.
When we asked for room slippers they said that there’s a shortage and they can’t give us 2 slippers. It’s a 5 star common you cannot give such reasons.

reviews.title: Not too bad
reviews.text: Need to have a car otherwise quite a walk to go to Leura shopping area.

Fairmont Resort Blue Mountains

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Comfortable large room and great beds
reviews.negatives:
Ambiance of Italian restaurant. Shame it looks so basic. With some tweaks it could be a more inviting space.
Rooms. No complimentary water or mini bar which was surprising.

reviews.title: A bag of chips opened by hotel staff before check out
reviews.text: Packed everything and went out for Breakfast, a bag of chips was picked from the bag, opened and moved to another desk. Luckily I moved valuables to the car. Bad reception, cause I mentioned this to the team and the receptionist said she will investigate and let me know what happened. And was trying to call back after check out and no answer, no response, not anything.

reviews.title: Good Food. Great staff. Just need a bit of maintenance works.
reviews.positives: Firstly, I would like to commend you on the overall quality of our stay. The service was impeccable, and the food was delightful. The efforts put into maintaining a high standard of hospitality were evident and much appreciated.
reviews.negatives: However, I couldn't help but notice certain aspects of the resort that could benefit from attention. Specifically, the physical condition of the complex seems to need remedial works.

reviews.title: Poor rooms, great grounds
reviews.text: Consistent with other reviews, the rooms are in poor condition. The bed was very soft & reception confirmed the use the same mattress throughout. The bathroom was a step up from a public change room. If you have low expectations & get a good price it’s still worthwhile if you’re going with kids as there’s lots to do within the grounds. The staff are wonderful
reviews.response:

Our team is dedicated to creating a welcoming atmosphere, and we are pleased to hear that you found our grounds enjoyable and our staff to be exceptional.
Your insights are invaluable as we continuously seek to improve our accommodations and overall guest experience. We are actively reviewing the feedback like yours to ensure we can continuously enhance the comfort and quality for our valued guests.

Thank you once again for your comments. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future for a more enjoyable stay. 

Kind regards,
Guest Relations Team
Fairmont Resort Blue Mountains - MGallery Collection

reviews.title: Great place to stay but slightly pricey during  holidays
reviews.positives:
1.I like it because it has so many activities for kids during this school holiday. 
2.The activities staff were so friendly and kind to kids. 
3. The view was just beyond stunning
4. The ice rink gave us another memorable experience
reviews.negatives:
1. We have hand soap in our shower room above the bath tub. I checked there wasn’t any body shower gel at all in my bathroom. You asked us to use hand soap to wash? I don’t know if that’s normal? 
2. We stayed two nights, but the room hasn’t been clean at all after the first night. We didn’t request not having housekeeping. 
3. It’s a school holiday time, there is only two staff at the reception. We waited for 20mins just want to check out. And when we were checking out, the staff told me the bank machine wasn’t working so asked me to leave my back card details for which I did leave the B bank card details. reviews.text:
Bad check in experience, we understand 3pm check in, yes we did arrive at 2.35pm. Told room is guaranteed to ready at 3pm, Concierge will call at 3pm. No call, join the queue at Concierge after 3pm to be told room not ready, talk to reception. Different person at reception apologise but unfortunately not time frame when room will be ready. We explain we have a seven year old daughter who wants to get changed and head to the pool. Unfortunately still unable to give us a time. My wife created a bit of a fuss, shortly after, a room was ready. While we're in the room changing Concierge call and say our room is now available!!!!
Next night in the Sublime Lounge we order three dishes for dinner, two dishes arrive, unfortunately one missed. Caesar Salad missing, young guy serving says wasn't on the docket. Asked him to check, after quite awhile he returned confirming it was on the docket. Dish arrived well after our family had finished our dinner.
Finally as you are aware the Smoke Alarm issue in the middle of the night of 13 January. Extremely loud, terrifying our young daughter and other children in our part of the hotel. Crying children echoing down the corridor in the middle of the night isn't pleasant.
reviews.response:
Dear Clifford,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your recent stay at the Fairmont Resort Blue Mountains - MGallery Collection. We value your input and appreciate your honest comments.

We sincerely apologize for the issues you experienced during your stay, particularly with the check-in process, the delayed Caesar Salad, and the disruption caused by the fire alarm in the middle of the night. We understand how these incidents impacted your overall experience and the comfort of your family, especially your young daughter.

Your feedback regarding the check-in process has been shared with our front desk team to ensure better communication and efficiency in the future. We are also addressing the delay in your dinner service with our restaurant team to prevent similar occurrences.

The fire alarm incident is regrettable, and we are taking measures to minimize such disruptions in the future while ensuring the safety of our guests.

We appreciate your un

reviews.title: Pros and Cons - for Family with Young Children
reviews.text:
We stayed at Fairmont Resort with 3 other families, with children under 12. 
Positives: 
- Two queen beds in a room to accommodate a family of four
- Big resort with many things to do 
- The kids love the playgrounds and the indoor pool
- The cinema is surprisingly quite big and nice

Negatives: 
- Hotel is quite dated, don't expect modern feel and look. The carpet is old with stains
- Cleanliness could be better. We found a lolly on the floor and hair in the bathroom
- Staff are not very friendly
- All other rooms have bath robes and slippers, but we had none
- I am not a fan of a shower bath with a fixed shower head. It is kind of dangerous
- The wall is very thin,  can easily hear next-door people talking 
- Outdoor swimming pool is too cold

Overall it was a nice stay and the kids had lots of fun. May stay again if the hotel rooms are renovated. Staff should also be more friendly.

reviews.title: Very Relaxing Space
reviews.text:
We were in Katoomba and needed a place to stay for Easter Weekend. We searched online, booked and caught a taxi to the resort. It was easy, simple and intuitive. 
Checking in was  breeze and we found our room in minutes. It was very clean, lovely attention to detail, there was no facial tissue box in the room, not sure why! Also, one of the three restaurants was closed, that didn't make sense on Easter! Others needed booking! Not convenient when you just dropped in!
There was a fabulous family atmosphere to the place, tennis courts, ponds, outdoor settings and horse riding!
We enjoyed our stay very much yet there was no shuttle to take us back to nearby sights or train station! Unusual for this well known chain not to have a courtesy shuttle for guests!

reviews.response:
Dear Joseph
Thank you for your review and rating, we are so pleased you enjoyed your stay here with us. and enjoyed the extensive resort facilities.
I apologise that you found the resort a bit run down. You will be pleased to know we are currently undergoing a large and carefully thought out rejuvenation programme for the resort. This includes substantial capital being placed into both the accommodation rooms as well as public facilities. While much of this has been complete (including brand new beds placed in every room, new Sony TVs and carpets) there remains some work to be done including the outdoor swimming pool  being completely revamped in time for Summer, as well as a brand new indoor gymnasium, teenage retreat room and refurbished tennis courts with additional sporting equipment.  Excitingly, we are also opening a 16 treatment room Day Spa facility on Monday 13th August! We are confident you will note continued improvements on a return stay with us. Kind regards, The Fairmot

reviews.title: “Not Happy Jan”
reviews.text: The inadequate parking is a joke, and there was not 1 space available. In the end we had to park in a painted no parking zone. We asked for some dessert and a drink at 10:15pm and were told this was NOT available via in room dining, in fact nothing was. No room service is a big down side for me. We were woken at 7:40am Sunday morning to screaming kids in the hallways singing Happy Birthday.  All up this was my second poor experience here. We had decided to give it another go after the mistaken belief the M Gallery / Sofitel would have ironed out the problems of the past. After completing the customer service survey, we were offered a room upgrade and breakfast for our “next stay”. Sadly there won’t be a “next stay”. Presumptuous to assume there would be. Do yourself a favour. Book somewhere else.

The breakfast was great, plenty to choose from, again the staff were friendly and helpful, plus great views from restaurant.

The suit was very roomy and I wish I could take the bed home with me, it was so comfy.  Very clean and always made up daily.
What a great idea to have a model train set up, this went over well with the children that were staying there and also not forgetting the "Big Kids".  This is a credit to John, who I understands maintains this set up.  This was an unexpected interactive display.  Thank you to all the Staff for making our stay memorable.

reviews.title: Luxurious, quiet and exactly what we were after.

Staff are extremely helpful, professional and non-intrusive. The perfect mix. The buffet breakfast was extensive. And even though the restaurant was very busy due to an on-site conference, the food was plentiful and we didn't have to wait for anything. The access to the billliards room was easy via reception and provided a really nice relaxation for us after using the gym, which although well-equipped had quite a few items missing, such as attachments for pulley exercises. Otherwise it was excellent.

Back to Fairmont, don't expect the facilities to be of 5-star.  The changing room + sauna = something like that of a local government playground standard.  The entire resort is quite old but they refurbished a lot of the stuff, yet not 100% of the stuff.  The buffet breakfast made me happy.  After all, I didn't get to explore the resort too much given the lack of time.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: This place was amazing.  It reminded me of a lodge in Canada.  The Room was very clean and the bed was comfortable.  I can't believe that they even have their own ice skating rink.  Plenty for kids to do

reviews.title: I expected more but room is a bit old.
reviews.text: We stayed only for one night, we end up only resting in the room after the long hours of flight and train travel to Sydney then Blue Mountains. Speedy room service with good food.  The room is quiet, spacious and clean, however is in need of a renovation. The carpeted floor leading to the room was stained with water marks. I expected more from a hotel of this standard. A little disappointed as we paid more for the courtyard room, but not only that there was no nice view, instead we found heap of leaves in the courtyard and cigarettes butts left on the table in our courtyard.
reviews.positives: Spacious and quiet room, breakfast at the terrace with nice view.

reviews.title: Not long enough!
reviews.positives: The breakfast buffet was fantastic and the beds were so comfortable.
reviews.negatives: nothing

reviews.title: nice pools
reviews.text: Having nice pools, good for family holiday with kids.
reviews.positives: nice pools, quiet surrounding, clean bathroom

reviews.title: Crisp air to wake up, mystery of mountain fog to jog the mind.
reviews.positives: The location is fantastic. Surrounded by nature, lots of facilities on site to relax the mind and body. And if you feel like it’s not enough the town centre is not far either.
reviews.negatives: They still have some issues with elevators. They are small and being restricted to single elevator causes some traffic. Going up and down the stairs is not that much of an issue unless you have lots of bags.

reviews.title: Comfortable 2-day trip
reviews.text: The 2-day trip of Blue Mountains was memorable and this hotel is quite comfortable. The room is large and tiny, with a king-size bed. We enjoyed the swimming pools (indoor and outdoor) and the SPA facilities. The activity rooms for kids are interesting. The breakfast was quite great.
reviews.positives: tiny and large room, good SPA, good breakfast

reviews.title: Easy , friendly, efficient and fun stay for all ages young and old
reviews.positives:
Overall a great experience with lots of activities if you want to bring your kids 
Old school arcade for the adults plus kids arcade, pool, spa, day spa, restaurants and full breakfast. Staff always helpful and kind will go above and beyond for you
reviews.negatives: Have to pay for movies in room you book
